info.name: Journal
info.summary: A private Markdown journal and personal knowledge workspace
info.description:
Journal is a private daily journal and lightweight personal knowledge workspace for Nextcloud.
Write one entry per day using Nextcloud Text, organize notes with categories and native Nextcloud System Tags, connect ideas through wikilinks, search your journal and export entries to Markdown or PDF.
Features:
- Daily entries organized by date - Native Markdown storage - YAML Front Matter metadata - Rich-text editing powered by Nextcloud Text - Multiple categories - Native Nextcloud System Tags - Full-text search - Wikilinks and note relations - Incoming and outgoing links - Markdown export - Individual and combined PDF export - Native Nextcloud Dashboard widget - Responsive desktop, tablet and mobile interface - English, Spanish and German translations
Journal keeps your content as regular Markdown files inside your own Nextcloud storage.
info.author: Miguel Torres
